title: SMALL BUSINESS NAVIGATOR HOTLINE - 211info
text: BUSINESS OREGON SMALL BUSINESS NAVIGATOR HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information and resource referral for businesses in Oregon regarding wildfires and other emergencies. Includes information on financial assistance programs and reopening guidance. 775 Summer Street NE Suite 200 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Business owners and employers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (833) 604-0880 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 986-0123 Main phone (503) 581-5115 FAX Hotline (833) 604-0880 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call and leave a voicemail for a callback or visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Disaster Loans * Business Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Business Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BUSINESS OREGON
